Class StripView.StripCell<T>

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.control.Control
javafx.scene.control.Labeled
javafx.scene.control.Label
com.dlsc.gemsfx.StripView.StripCell<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the model object shown by the cell
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget, javafx.scene.control.Skinnable
Enclosing class:
StripView<T>
public static class StripView.StripCell<T> extends javafx.scene.control.Label
A strip cell is being used by cell factories of the StripView control.

  • Property Summary

    Properties
    Type
    Property
    Description
    final javafx.beans.property.ObjectProperty<T>
    item
    The model item shown in the cell.
    final javafx.beans.property.BooleanProperty
    selected
    Defines whether a cell is currently selected or not.
    final javafx.beans.property.ObjectProperty<StripView<T>>
    stripView
    Stores a reference back to the strip view where the cell is being used.
